documents.title: Nominee 278
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed before Senate confirmation as Attorney General. Lists Ballard Partners and Panza, Maurer & Maynard PA legal-fee receivables, America First Policy Institute and Newsmax positions, PB Advisory LLC sole proprietorship, and Trump Media & Technology Group (formerly Renatus LLC / DWAC) shares and warrants received as consulting compensation.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement
documents.summary: Letter signed Jan 14, 2025. Commits to: resign from Ballard Partners; resign from Panza, Maurer & Maynard PA (legal fees outstanding); resign from America First Policy Institute, SOMA Global, and Newsmax; cease PB Advisory LLC consulting (Section 2 & 3); divest Trump Media & Technology Group equity received as consulting compensation within 90 days (Section 4).

documents.title: Compliance Certification
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing).

documents.title: 278 Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report (Form 278-T) disclosing individual securities transactions over $1,000 during the reporting window. See PDF for itemized transactions including any Trump Media & Technology Group disposals.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Pam Bondi. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
